articles.title: Deaths and debts: Missiles in Gulf shake millions of South Asian families
articles.description: Most people killed in Iran's Gulf attacks have been from South Asia. And entire economies back home are on edge.

articles.title: PM Modi to inaugurate Noida International Airport Phase I with  ₹11,200 crore investment on March 28 — Check schedule
articles.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will inaugurate Phase I of Noida International Airport on March 28. The airport aims to enhance regional connectivity and become a major international gateway for the National Capital Region, complementing Indira Gandhi International Airport.

articles.title: When drinking water became a revolution | Mahad Satyagraha
articles.description:
A century ago, Ambedkar led a protest in Mahad that turned the right to water into a fight for dignity and equality.
When drinking water became an act of resistance, this is the story of the Mahad Satyagraha. 100 years after Mahad, Ambedkar’s fight for equality still resonates across India.

articles.title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: IUML leader’s ‘misogynistic’ remark triggers row in Kayamkulam
Senegal appeal to CAS against handing over of AFCON title to Morocco
articles.description: Senegal hope to overturn CAF's decision to crown Morocco champions after a walkout by Senegalese players in the final.

articles.title: India to replace paper forms with e-Arrival Card from April 2026
articles.description: India to replace paper forms with eArrival Card from April

topStories.title: Maharashtra Congress president demands NCP Minister resignation over a controversial video
topStories.description: Harshavardhan Sapkal said that it is shocking to see such unethical behaviour of a public representative in whom people have invested their faith and money

topStories.description: Boman Irani also talked about the one issue Indians have been bonding over since the start of the war on February 28 — the LPG crisis.

topStories.title: Iran Preps For Island Warfare Amid Talk Of US Ground Offensive On Kharg
topStories.description: Kharg Island is about 25 km off the coast of Iran. Its proximity to the Strait of Hormuz, makes it a strategic port for 90 per cent of Iran's exports

topStories.description: Iranian media also reported that the Iran-backed Houthis in Yemen might also join the ongoing fight against the US and Israeli forces to help Tehran take control of the Bab al-Mandeb

topStories.title: US Man Jailed For Breaking Into Woman's House And 'Sucking On Her Toes'
topStories.description: A California man has been sentenced to more than six years in jail for breaking into a woman's home and assaulting her by sucking her toes.

topStories.title: Oil prices rise higher as Iran denies US talks, dimming deescalation hopes
topStories.description: Brent crude tops $104 a barrel as hopes fade for deescalation in US-Israel war on Iran.

topStories.title: US Troops Relocate To Hotels After Bases Attacked In Middle East: Report
topStories.description: Iran's bombing of the US bases in the region in retaliation for the US-Israeli war has forced many American troops to relocate to hotels and office spaces throughout the region, NYT reported quoting...

topStories.title: US lawmakers push for pause in data centres until AI safeguards in place
topStories.description: Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez introduce bill to pause AI rollout amid growing backlash to technology.

topStories.title: Russia slams second US-Israeli strike at Iran’s Bushehr nuclear reactor
topStories.description: Russia’s foreign ministry has accused the US and Israel of trying to spark a nuclear disaster after a strike at Bushehr.

topStories.title: US jury finds Meta, Google, liable in social media addiction trial
topStories.description: A Los Angeles jury has found Alphabet's Google and Meta liable for $6 million in a landmark social media addiction case.

topStories.title: Harrison: ‘There is going to be some kind of a military escalation.’
topStories.description: Ross Harrison says public talk of diplomacy between the US and Iran is hiding hardline positions.

topStories.description: Julie Murray, whose sister Maura Murray vanished in 2004, warns that urgency fades in missing cases as Nancy Guthrie remains missing after 50 days.

dailyNews.title: Illegal immigrant accused of groping girls at Virginia high school facing new charges
dailyNews.description: An illegal immigrant accused of groping female students at Fairfax High School in Virginia was served with four more counts after additional victims came forward.

dailyNews.title: New Jersey Gov Sherrill signs law barring ICE agents from wearing face coverings to shield identities
dailyNews.description: New Jersey Gov. Mikie Sherrill signed a law that limits face coverings for ICE agents and requires them to present identification before detaining someone.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin makes new criminal referrals to DOJ targeting New York AG Letitia James
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has made criminal referrals to the DOJ alleging New York AG Letitia James committed homeowners insurance fraud, officials confirmed.

dailyNews.title: Gorman family calls out Johnson and Pritzker following college student's killing in Chicago
dailyNews.description: The Gorman family is demanding accountability from Chicago and Illinois leaders, rejecting their 'senseless tragedy' framing of Sheridan's death.

dailyNews.title: Iran is 'trying to give the global economy a heart attack' by closing Strait of Hormuz, UAE minister says
dailyNews.description: United Arab Emirates official Lana Nusseibeh criticized Iran's restrictions on the Strait of Hormuz and its use of ballistic missiles and drones during an interview with Fox News.

dailyNews.title: Journalist tells San Francisco board ‘Nick Shirley’s coming to town’ amid fentanyl, crime concerns
dailyNews.description: A public comment at the San Francisco Board of Supervisors raises concerns over fentanyl deaths, crime, and homelessness, as a speaker warns “Nick Shirley’s coming to town."

dailyNews.title: DOJ settles with Michael Flynn over Russia probe after wrongful prosecution claim: 'Historic injustice'
dailyNews.description: The DOJ settled with former Trump national security adviser Michael Flynn for a reported $1.2 million, calling it a step to redress what it described as a "historic injustice."

dailyNews.title: Wine, beer or liquor: Study finds one drink is linked to lower risk of death than others
dailyNews.description: A new study found moderate wine drinkers had a 21% lower cardiovascular death risk, while beer and spirits raised risk even at low intake levels. Experts urge caution.

dailyNews.title: Cop on trial denies gunning for fellow officer in clash at home; prosecutors argue lethal risk was real
dailyNews.description: Former North Andover Officer Kelsey Fitzsimmons testified she never aimed her gun at Officer Patrick Noonan, claiming she was attempting suicide when shot.

dailyNews.title: US moves airborne troops, Marines as Iran rejects ceasefire, raising ground war potential
dailyNews.description: The U.S. deployed the 82nd Airborne and thousands of Marines and sailors to the Middle East, and experts say limited Iran operations could target the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Jimmy Kimmel's dig at 'plumber' DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin ripped as 'elite' by online critics
dailyNews.description: ABC late-night host Jimmy Kimmel faced backlash after mocking newly confirmed DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin as an unqualified plumber during his monologue.

dailyNews.title: Jurors shown bodycam of doctor’s bloody wife, rock he allegedly used to bash her in cliffside attack
dailyNews.description: Graphic bodycam footage and a bloodstained rock were shown to jurors in the attempted murder trial of Hawaii doctor Gerhardt Konig Wednesday.

topStories.title: House Budget chairman reveals how Republicans will pay for the Iran campaign
topStories.description: House Republicans will push a second budget reconciliation bill to fund Trump's Iran campaign and cut fraud in social services, House Budget Committee Chair Arrington said.

topStories.title: Bruce Springsteen doubles down on anti-Trump, anti-ICE stance, says 'blowback is just part of it'
topStories.description: Bruce Springsteen doubled down on his political stances ahead of a "No Kings" rally in St. Paul and his 20-day "Land of Hope and Dreams American Tour."

topStories.title: Trump’s Threats to Europe Put Its Leaders in a Double Bind Over Iran
topStories.description: European politicians risk angering their voters if they join America’s war. Yet they could also face domestic upheaval if they take no action to reopen shipping routes that Iran has blocked and ease an energy crisis.

topStories.title: Trump Had His Eye on China, Then Plunged Into a New Mideast War
topStories.description: The Trump administration said the Middle East would “recede” in importance as the China challenge took priority. But the president started the war in Iran.

topStories.title: Melania Trump Appears With a Robot, Saying More Children Should Be Educated by Them
topStories.description: The first lady, Melania Trump, believes that more children should be educated by “humanoid educators.”

topStories.title: Trump to Delay Nominating New C.D.C. Director
topStories.description: The administration has yet to find a candidate who aligns with Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s agenda while avoiding his unpopular stance on vaccines.

topStories.title: Kate Marvel, Prominent Climate Scientist, Resigns From NASA
topStories.description: Kate Marvel, a well-known author, joins an estimated 95,000 people who have left federal science agencies since President Trump returned to the White House.

topStories.title: Justice Dept. Settles Flynn’s Wrongful Prosecution Suit for $1.25 Million
topStories.description: The agreement was an extraordinary example of how the Trump administration has offered legal relief to those aligned with the president.

dailyNews.description: The agreement was an extraordinary example of how the Trump administration has offered legal relief to those aligned with the president.

dailyNews.title: How U.S.A.I.D. Birth Control Meant for Africa Was Ruined
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration had options for offloading contraceptives once destined for Africa, a newly obtained memo shows. Instead, it has let them collect dust and go bad.

dailyNews.title: White House says Trump will "unleash hell" if Iran doesn't make deal
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said talks between Washington and Tehran were ongoing, hours after Iran's state media said the regime rejected proosals by the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump official refers New York AG Letitia James for prosecution again
dailyNews.description: A Trump administration official has made new criminal referrals against New York Attorney General Letitia James to federal prosecutors in Miami and Chicago for two cases of possible homeowner's insurance fraud, sources told CBS News.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he doesn't call Iran conflict a "war" due to need for approval from Congress
dailyNews.description: President Trump suggested late Wednesday he's avoiding describing the military conflict with Iran as a "war" because of concerns around the fact that Congress hasn't authorized military force.

dailyNews.title: Former Iran detainees fear Americans held in Iranian prisons face heightened danger
dailyNews.description: Emad Shargi, who was released from Iran's Evin prison in 2023, said "it's important" that President Trump "hears that there are innocent Americans being held like we were as political pawns."

dailyNews.title: 3/25: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Long TSA lines continue continue across the country as DHS shutdown hits Day 40; White House says Trump will "unleash Hell" if Iran doesn't make a deal.

dailyNews.title: Democrats flip seat in district that includes Mar-a-Lago
dailyNews.description: In a Florida special election on Tuesday, Democrats flipped a state House seat in a district that includes President Trump's Mar-a-Lago estate. Political strategists Kendra Barkoff Lamy and Doug Heye join "The Takeout" with analysis.

dailyNews.title: Former Justice Department workers accuse Trump of degrading department
dailyNews.description: Since President Trump took office for a second time, the Justice Department has undergone significant changes. Former DOJ litigator Stacey Young, founder and executive director of Justice Connection, joins "The Takeout" to discuss her organization's efforts to reform the Department.

dailyNews.title: Iran has no intention to hold talks with U.S; foreign minister says Trump proposal to end war being reviewed
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has claimed the U.S. and Iran are "in negotiations now." But the Islamic Republic denies any direct talks to end the war.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Justices Barrett, Gorsuch ‘sicken me’ after Supreme Court tariff ruling
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court, in a 6-3 ruling, said President Trump did not have authority under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act to impose tariffs.

dailyNews.title: White House posts cryptic videos, deletes one, fueling speculation online
dailyNews.description: Two mysterious videos posted to the official White House X account on Wednesday night are generating buzz online, with the purpose of the short, vertically shot clips unclear.

dailyNews.title: Trump wants to squeeze Iran into peace talks with more troops — but it may backfire, analysts say
dailyNews.description: Trump's threats to ramp up military presence may be to pressure Iran to negotiate but the battle may be harder than he calculated, say analysts.
